RepairRecords.Description: Engine overhaul after oil pressure drop warning.
RepairRecords.Notes: Replaced main bearings and serviced injectors.

RepairRecords.Description: Hydraulic lift arms losing pressure under load.
RepairRecords.Notes: Seal kit and pump calibration completed same day.

RepairRecords.Description: Feeder house chain and sprocket replacement before wheat season.
RepairRecords.Notes: Preventive work ahead of harvest window.

RepairRecords.Description: Motor overheating and intermittent cutout during greenhouse irrigation.
Fuel line leak and hard starting after storage.
RepairRecords.Notes: Fuel line replaced and carburetor cleaned.

RepairRecords.Description: Boom section nozzle manifold cracked during field turn.
RepairRecords.Notes: Temporary bypass fitted until replacement manifold arrives.

RepairRecords.Description: Front suspension bush replacement and wheel alignment.
Drive belt and bearing replacement on threshing drum.
RepairRecords.Notes: Unit returned to service after half-day downtime.

RepairRecords.Description: Battery terminal corrosion and starter relay inspection.
RepairRecords.Notes: Quick fix before morning field prep.
